title: China issues red alert for rainstorms as Typhoon Bavi makes landfall
description: China issues a red alert for rainstorms as Typhoon Bavi makes landfall, prompting evacuations and emergency responses across eastern cities.
snippet:
Nearly 2 million people have been evacuated in eastern China as Typhoon Bavi made landfall, bringing strong winds and heavy rain to the region, officials said.
...

similar.title: Typhoon Bavi batters east China; Taiwan reports 134 injured
similar.description: Typhoon Bavi, China's most powerful storm this year, caused widespread damage. Emergency crews cleared streets littered with fallen trees and debris. Nearly two million people were evacuated ahead of the storm's arrival. The typhoon also brought heavy rain and injuries to Taiwan. Forecasters warned of continued rainfall across eastern and northern China.

title: Nach dem Flop von „Furiosa“: Kommt trotzdem ein neuer „Mad Max“-Film?
description: Der Flop von „Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga“ hat die „Mad Max“-Reihe erschüttert. Dabei hat Regisseur George Miller noch einige Ideen für weitere Projekte im Köcher, wie es heißt. Haben sie nach dem Fiasko mit „Furiosa“ eine Chance auf Umsetzung?

This situation signals a significant shift in the country's economic landscape.
